description_long: This lamp features a modern, geometric design with a square-shaped shade and a matching square base. The lamp's body is composed of clean, straight lines, giving it a minimalist and contemporary appearance. The shade appears to be made of a metallic or opaque material, with a subtle reflective quality. The base is solid and wide, providing stability, and is finished in a darker, glossy material that contrasts with the lighter shade. The central support column is slender and connects the base to the shade seamlessly. There are no visible decorative embellishments, emphasizing a sleek and functional aesthetic suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, square-based lamp with a minimalist design, featuring a metallic shade and a glossy dark base. Its clean lines and geometric form give it a contemporary urban look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the square shade and wide, glossy base with a central support column.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, highlighting the lamp's symmetrical, boxy profile.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with the same geometric lines and base-to-shade connection.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the uniform, square design and glossy base.
